title: Substrate Frontmatter — v1
description: Required and optional YAML frontmatter for any agent-homebase substrate file (skill, instruction, agent, profile, callable, policy, schema). Implements command-centre/01-protocols/frontmatter-spec.md (contract tag: frontmatter-v1).

id.description: Globally unique, stable identifier within the substrate. Lowercase, dot/dash/underscore allowed.

version.description: File-level semver, independent of repo semver.

applies_to.description: Path glob(s) where this file is active. Use "**" for global.

scope.description: Alias for applies_to. Deprecated, accepted on read for one minor version (sunsets at frontmatter-v2).

replaces.description: id of a deprecated file this supersedes.

depends_on.description: List of other file ids required to be present.
